rtstruct_path.description: Path to RTSTRUCT DICOM file. rt_margin is a structure-geometry tool and does not require RTDOSE.

from_structure.description: Source structure name (A in A -> B). Boundary samples are taken from this structure.

to_structure.description: Target structure name (B in A -> B). Clearance is measured from source boundary samples into this structure.

direction.description: Optional anatomical direction filter. uniform uses all source boundary samples. lateral is a conservative min(left,right) clearance.

interpolation.description: If true, interpolate contour planes before RTSTRUCT voxelization.

z_segments.description: Number of synthetic contour planes inserted between neighboring slices when interpolation=true. Ignored when interpolation=false.

coverage_thresholds_mm.description: Clearance thresholds in mm used for coverage metrics. Example: [3,5,7]. For threshold t, coverage(t) is the percent of boundary samples with clearance >= t.

summary_percentile.description: Primary reported percentile in [0,100]. Example: 5 means summary_mm is the 5th percentile clearance.

direction_cone_degrees.description: Directional cone half-angle in degrees for posterior/anterior/left/right/superior/inferior/lateral measurements.

xy_resolution_mm.description: Synthetic in-plane voxel size in mm for RTSTRUCT-only clearance computation. Smaller values increase accuracy and runtime.

z_resolution_mm.description: Optional synthetic slice spacing in mm for RTSTRUCT-only clearance computation. Omit this field to let the engine choose automatically.

max_voxels.description: Maximum synthetic voxel count allowed before the engine auto-coarsens resolution for performance.
